---
title: "Research — Mete Akcaoglu"
---

# Research

Professor of Instructional Technology · Georgia Southern University

## Research Program

My work focuses on the design and evaluation of technology-rich learning
environments, with an emphasis on motivation, curiosity, and computational
thinking in K–12 settings.

**h-index 27 · 4,488 citations** ·
[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=0y1b0oEAAAAJ&hl=en)

## Research Interests

- Interest and motivation development in technology-rich environments
- Game-based learning and computational thinking
- AI in education and LLM-assisted research workflows
- Online learning design

## Publications

*Full details coming soon.*

[View CV for complete publication record](cv.html)
